mapper.select: SELECT bm.ID, bm.CONTENT, bm.NICKNAME, bm.AVATAR, bm.IP, bm.IP_REGION, bm.USER_AGENT, bm.AUDIT_STATUS, bm.AUDIT_REASON, bm.AUDIT_TIME, bm.DEVICE_ID, bm.SPEED, bm.COLOR, bm.CREATE_TIME, (SELECT USERNAME FROM user u WHERE u.ID = bm.AUDIT_USER_ID) AS AUDIT_USERNAME FROM barrage_message bm WHERE bm.ID = #{barrageMessageId}
SELECT bm.ID, bm.CONTENT, bm.NICKNAME, bm.AVATAR, bm.SPEED, bm.COLOR FROM barrage_message bm WHERE bm.AUDIT_STATUS = 1 ORDER BY bm.CREATE_TIME DESC LIMIT #{limit}
